heading: Payment of interest
label: 4005 Payment of interest
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Sept. 1, 1988section 613(b) of Pub. L. 100–86section 4001 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b) or (c) and notwithstanding any other provision of law, interest shall accrue on funds deposited in an interest-bearing account at a depository institution beginning not later than the business day on which the depository institution receives provisional credit for such funds.

children.heading: Special rule for credit unions
children.label: b Special rule for credit unions

children.text: begins the accrual of interest or dividends at a later date than the date described in subsection (a) with respect to all funds, including cash, deposited in such account; and
provides notice of the interest payment policy in the manner required under .section 4004(e) of this title

children.heading: Exception for checks returned unpaid
children.label: c Exception for checks returned unpaid
children.text: No provision of this chapter shall be construed as requiring the payment of interest or dividends on funds deposited by a check which is returned unpaid.
